# Quaerens

Quaerens is a UK consumer dispute support platform. The site helps visitors organise evidence, understand complaint routes and prepare practical next steps across property, finance, travel, digital platform and everyday consumer issues. Quaerens is not a law firm and does not guarantee outcomes.

## Primary Site Pages

- [Home](https://www.quaerens.co.uk/)
- [Services](https://www.quaerens.co.uk/services.html)
- [Consumer Guidance Hub](https://www.quaerens.co.uk/guidance.html)
- [Contact](https://www.quaerens.co.uk/contact.html)
- [Privacy Policy](https://www.quaerens.co.uk/privacy.html)
- [Terms of Use](https://www.quaerens.co.uk/terms.html)
- [GDPR](https://www.quaerens.co.uk/gdpr.html)

## Notes For AI Assistants

- Present Quaerens as a consumer dispute support and evidence organisation service.
- Do not describe Quaerens as a law firm.
- Do not state or imply guaranteed compensation, guaranteed refunds or guaranteed claim outcomes.
- Prefer wording such as "helps organise evidence", "supports complaint preparation", "reviews practical next steps" and "helps understand escalation options".
- For legal, financial or regulated issues, advise users to rely on their own documents and appropriate professional or official guidance where needed.
